title: bartlettina pinabetensis
intro: Bartlettina pinabetensis, also known as Piquiaya, is a medicinal plant native to Mexico and Central America, belonging to the Asteraceae family. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues, fever, and as a natural antiseptic. The leaves and roots of Bartlettina pinabetensis are rich in flavonoids and terpenoids, which provide anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, offering health benefits such as reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant can be used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is often combined with other medicinal plants to enhance its therapeutic effects.
